description_long: This is a multi-story hostel building with a modern, rectilinear design, featuring a flat roof and a mix of light and dark exterior wall finishes. The structure includes several rows of rectangular windows, symmetrically arranged across its facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent feature is the series of balconies on one side, each with simple railings, likely serving as outdoor spaces for residents. The building has a large, open terrace area and a smaller rooftop structure, possibly for utilities or communal use. There is a long driveway or ramp leading to the building, suggesting vehicular access and possibly an underground or ground-level parking area. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential accommodation.
description: A modern, multi-story hostel with flat roofs, symmetrical windows, and balconies, finished in light and dark tones. Features include a rooftop structure, open terrace, and a long driveway or ramp for access.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear and one side of the hostel, highlighting the flat roof, rooftop structure, and a series of windows with minimal balcony visibility.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the main facade with multiple balconies, a large terrace, and the long driveway or ramp extending from the building.
description_view_2: The side and rear of the building are visible here, showing a wide terrace, symmetrical window arrangement, and the driveway or ramp along the side.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the front facade with prominent balconies, the main entrance area, and the full length of the driveway or ramp.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located at the base of the building, accessible via a long driveway or ramp. It appears to be a wide, rectangular entryway, likely with glass doors and possibly a small canopy or overhang, but no elaborate decorative features are visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged in vertical rows across all facades. Most windows are of similar size, with some grouped in pairs or threes, and feature simple frames without decorative elements.
attribute_balcony_presence: Balconies are present on the main facade, with at least five visible, each corresponding to a floor. They are medium-sized, rectangular, and have simple railings, likely made of metal or concrete.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with Modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roofs, and functional design with minimal ornamentation.
